scenarios.description: clone() on document with HTML outputSettings retains html syntax and independent deep copy of settings
scenarios.precondition: Document with outputSettings.syntax(html) and prettyPrint disabled on original
scenarios.expectedResult: Clone has syntax html, prettyPrint=false; modifying clone.settings.syntax(xml) does not affect original
pseudocode: TEST TC05 clone retains html syntax and deep copy

scenarios.description: clone() preserves null connection field so connection() returns a new session each time
scenarios.precondition: Document created without setting connection (null default)
scenarios.expectedResult: orig.connection() and clone.connection() both return non-null distinct Connection sessions

scenarios.description: clone() produces independent DOM: adding child to clone does not affect original childNodes
scenarios.precondition: Document with one body element and no custom children under body
scenarios.expectedResult: Clone has its own childNodes: adding an element to clone.body() increases clone size only
pseudocode: TEST TC07 clone independent DOM structure
